Name: Ultravisor Beacon
Tagline: Ultravisor Beacon: lightweight beacon client and Fable service for remote task execution

					<path d="M 24 16 L 48 44 L 72 16 Z" fill="#64b8cc" opacity="0.9"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">UB</text>
	</svg>
